description_long: This is a robust, rectangular brown storage box with a recessed top and horizontal slats on its sides, giving it a sturdy, utilitarian appearance. The front face features a blurred label area with Japanese katakana characters, suggesting it may be used for specific categorized storage or collection in an urban environment. One side displays a white duck icon, possibly indicating a playful or designated use, while another side has a small area with additional icons or signage. The box appears to be made primarily of molded plastic, with a solid, hard exterior and a likely hollow interior for storage. Its design is simple and functional, with no visible handles or complex mechanisms, and the top opening suggests it may be accessed from above. The overall finish is matte with a slight sheen, and the box is likely intended for use on the ground or floor in public or semi-public spaces.
description: A sturdy brown plastic storage box with a recessed top, horizontal slats, and distinct signage including Japanese text and a duck icon. It has a matte finish and is designed for practical urban use.
description_view_0: Front view shows a blurred label area with Japanese katakana characters and horizontal slats.
description_view_1: This side view features a small area with additional icons or signage near the bottom right.
description_view_2: The back view is plain with horizontal slats and no visible signage or icons.
description_view_3: This side view displays a white duck icon on the lower panel, distinguishing it from other sides.
attribute_labeling_or_signage: printed label area with Japanese text, white duck icon, small icon cluster
